reviews.review_title: Love this game, but one problem.
reviews.review_description: So I love this game a ton. Don’t get me wrong with a 3 star review. The game plays like Ancient Dungeons, mixed with Dungeons of Eternity. However; my massive problem, is when I’m trying to play a private game with my son, whom is a younger child. We only ever get to play one level, then when done, we are forced into a room, of losers screaming, and swearing at each other. Now I will never report people, as I know online play cannot be rated, or controlled. However; if I’m starting up a game in a private game, when we are done, we should be returning to a private lobby, without anyone but us. This was never an issue before, and needs to be fixed immediately.

I have been playing with a small group since the early days, back when there was only two dungeons. The fact that when you start a private lobby and are thrown back into the non-private lobby, has made us quit playing. Private should stay private unless intentionally changed, not reset after dungeon completion.  Still really love the concept and gameplay. Thought about gifting to more friends, but since private is not staying private and when we complete a dungeon we exit to cussing and people being stupid…. We are done. Maybe give it a year and see if they have their act together again like in the beginning.

Tried playing with my boys in a private game and we kept getting dropped into a public server after each round. After I looked it up ok discord, I learned this was an intentional choice by the developers and we are 2 hours in so I can’t refund it. Really appreciate all the forced profanity.

This game is good and Im gonna explain why, first of above the weapons are good, second of above the bosses and levels are very good, third of above there is 50-70% of nice users, and final of above this game is addictive because when I had Dungeon Free i didnt play that much but until when I got the full version, I am forced to play this great game every day, and reason why I made it because I want the review skin

My nephew and I will start playing a game and a private channel. After we completed dungeon we are then transported into a big group lobby. I really feel if you start on a private channel when you're done with one of the dungeons you should go back into a private channel.

This game is awesome you take place as a dungeon warrior fighting monsters and be careful because at the end you fight a boss this game makes you face puzzles and challenges and my favorite part is you can unlock new weapons to help face the danger that lies ahead 10/10 recommend

This is a really good game overall and it seems the creator has put a lot of work and effort towards it. Problem is the public rooms, every time I join one it’s just screaming and yelling and cussing and overall just being mean to each other throughout the whole room and they all of course… are little kids it needs some sort of way to warn them of the bad nonsense they are using

reviews.review_title: This game has some problems but is fun
reviews.review_description: The issues with the game are if I’m on the Highest difficulty which is difficulty 6 I should have a higher chance of getting Legendary weapons…and that if the mini boss falls into the voids in any of the four levels the loot should not fall with the Mini bosses but the game can be fun.

reviews.review_title: Loving each new update that comes out
reviews.review_description:
Love the new changes made to the game. I waited so long for new weapons and they’ve added so much more variety since last played. Not to mention the new hub they added a couple updates back which made it so much easier to navigate having everyone grouped together, which makes sense since they expanded the number of people in the lobby by a lot more.

One thing I would like to see going forward is more activities for people to do outside the main dungeon runs to really put the expanded number of players in the lobby to use.

A seriously good game, and I mean it. Unfortunately, once you reach endgame, there's nothing else to do besides... Well, playing the game. There's no extra aspects for people who have tons of items and are nearly max level. Difficulty 6, especially on the new Time Rift, is insanely easy. If there was like an extra few things endgame players could access (i.e a difficulty 7 which could create a huge difficulty spike, a great challenge since the bosses, even aeternitas, is insanely easy. or new weapons that don't take ages to grind for.)

If you liked Minecraft dungeons or just Minecraft in general then you’ll love this game as well the details to every enemy and the variety of them each one having their own moveset some more challenging then others 10/10 game!!

reviews.review_title: A Great Game with a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: I found this game over a year ago. Im a sucker for dungeon crawlers so this seemed like a good idea at the time. Fast Forward to today and its my most played game on VR. I'm not gonna say its perfect because it has its flaws. I just think this game has a lot of potential and a development team that cares for the game. The community is also a wonderful place to meet people and have fun in game.

This app holds its own against competitive titles. It is fun with different levels of difficulties. 

I play with a static group of people. We are used to making a private multiplayer room and it remains consistent throughout our game night. This appears to have that function, but it isn’t quite as expected. After each dungeon run, it puts the team into a public room. The private room has to be recreated and a different join code has to be shared with teammates. It is inconvenient, but the actual gameplay is unaffected. 

I look forward to seeing more content.

Pixel Dungeon was the first game I got after I purchased the oculus 3 in the big 2026. The combat feels smooth, and the game is pretty awesome. I can feel myself become one with the pixels. Now, its YOUR turn to become pixelated and have fun on this amazing game. I played this game for about 6 7 months. Still play it all the time. Game is still getting updates. Im impressed. Keep up the good work. YIPEEE

I really enjoyed this game. Bought several skin packs.  Now they've announced they are changing the game and you'll have to use Gorilla Tag movement. Why ruin this game? People are not happy and you'll lose 60% off your player base. People don't buy this game.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thank you so much for your support and for being so open with your concerns — we completely understand why that announcement might have caused some confusion and worry.

To be clear: we are NOT changing Pixel Dungeon at all. The game you love will stay exactly as it is, with continued updates and support as always.

What we announced in our discord is a brand new, separate project made by the same original team behind Pixel Dungeon. It's a free-to-play game with Gorilla Tag‑style movement, open‑world exploration, transformations, and combat — a completely different experience from Pixel Dungeon. Think of it as a new adventure from the same family, not a replacement.

This new game won't affect Pixel Dungeon in any way. It's simply an extra offering for our community — something fresh and different for those who want to try it, while the original game continues exactly as before.

We'd love for you and all our long-time fans to give it a shot when it launches, but no pressure at all. Pixel Dungeon isn't going anywhere ❤️ Thanks again for caring enough to speak up — that means a lot to us.
